tool_args.label: Transit All-Stars, March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: TRANSIT ALL-STARS - Recognizing our Employees. March 2025 Honorees. Our teams across NYCT continue to do incredible things, collectively working towards improving service and security. Transit All-Stars is an employee recognition program that celebrates high performers who are also on-target to meet or exceed annual NYCT's service and safety goals.

payload.title: TRANSIT ALL-STARS
payload.description: Quarterly employee recognition program showcasing NYCT employees for their contributions to service and safety.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Select Bus Service (SBS) Program
tool_args.raw_text: Rob is also overseeing the 20 Select Bus Service routes. The SBS fare payment machines require ongoing repair and upkeep, as well as relocation for construction activity. With travel speed gains of up to 15-20%, the SBS program has been one of the agency's most successful efforts in bringing faster and more reliable service to our customers.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Rob is also overseeing the 20 Select Bus Service routes. The SBS fare payment machines require ongoing repair and upkeep, as well as relocation for construction activity
With travel speed gains of up to 15-20%, the SBS program has been one of the agency's most successful efforts
